---
title: " "
knit: (function(input_file, encoding) {
  out_dir <- 'docs';
  rmarkdown::render(input_file,
 encoding=encoding,
 output_file=file.path(dirname(input_file), out_dir, 'index.html'))})
layout: default
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    css: "style.css"
---

<center> <h1>Anna (Ganna) Malinovskaya</h1> </center>

<center>
Ph.D. Candidate in [Applied Economics & Management at Cornell University](https://dyson.cornell.edu/)   
*Pronouns:* She/her/hers    
[Pronouncing my name](https://namedrop.io/annamalinovskaya)     
</center>

</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>

<center>
<img src="photo_of_me.png" style="width:20%;
border:1px solid; border-color:black">
</center>

</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>

<center>
My fields of specialization are Public Economics and Applied Econometrics with interests in Labor, Education, and Crime. I am currently studying the long-term effects of the WIC program and the effects of COVID-driven technology adoption on US firm labor demand. I will be on the job market in the 2023-2024 academic year.
</center>

</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>
